contexts.context: …fine. I would still like to know the <mark>justification</mark>.
MK: This corrects the history and <mark>justification</mark>. It’s purely editorial.
JLY: What was the <mark>justification</mark> for not giving more power to strip-space…
RD: We don’t have similar <mark>justification</mark> for any of the other parts of the spec…
